focus: Deterministic corpus calibration of section shape, Quick Start coverage, token vocabulary, typography roles, and meaningful absences

summary: Token calibration should version category/value shapes and family-aware ranges without enforcing median cardinalities or synthesizing absent categories.

name: preserve-family-variance
statement: Corpus frequency calibrates contracts but does not establish design quality; requiredness must follow evidence and capability predicates.
All 1,290 Quick Starts expose radius variables while only 1,124 JSON bundles have a top-level radius category; preserve this as a provenance/contract fixture.
